---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve. Why is this feature needed?

**Example:** "As a researcher, I'm frustrated when [specific scenario] because [reason]..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. How should this feature work?

## Alternative Approaches

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. Why would your proposed solution be better?

## Use Cases

Describe specific scenarios where this feature would be valuable:

1. **Use Case 1:** [Description]
2. **Use Case 2:** [Description]

## Design Mockups (Optional)

If applicable, add sketches, wireframes, or screenshots to illustrate the feature.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples from other tools, or relevant research about the feature request here.

## Impact

How would this feature benefit the scientific community or improve the workflow?

## Priority (Your Opinion)

- [ ] Critical — Blocks my work
- [ ] High — Would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium — Nice to have
- [ ] Low — Minor improvement
